message:
fix(web): bug fixes from code review

- Add missing .animate-confetti-fall utility class in globals.css
- Remove unused Loader2 import from stepper.tsx
- Remove unused CheckCircle2 import from page.tsx
- Fix ConfettiParticle using Math.random() in render (non-deterministic)
  - Pre-calculate random values when particles are created
  - Pass as props for deterministic rendering
- Fix hydration flash in page.tsx animations
  - Always apply opacity-0 to start invisible
  - Only apply animate-slide-up when mounted
- Fix terminal animation blank frame when looping
  - Reset to 1 instead of 0 to avoid empty frame

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
